free_text: Complete set of first-order polarization observables
in nucleon-deuteron elastic scattering near 20 MeV
Target material was hydrogen or deuterium gas in the
small gas cell with a 2.5 mu-m thick Havar window.
particles were detected by four counter telescopes
composed of a thin silicon surface-barrier detector
and a thick one, installed so that there were two on
the left turntable and two on the right turntable.
Particle identifiers were used if it was a need to
CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year and lower cases.
Total error. The differential cross section
was measured independently of the analyzing-power
measurements. Estimated typical errors and their
SD: SF9=EXP deleted from REACTION code.

and the counting statistics the latter being less
